Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.connector.impl

Interface DataBaseConnector

All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractDataBaseConnector, MySQLDataBaseConnector, PostgreSQLDataBaseConnector, SingleDataBaseConnector, SQLiteDataBaseConnector, ThreadLocalDataBaseConnector
public interface DataBaseConnector extends Cloneable

      Returns:

      true if the connection needed to be reset
